tasks.title: Freeze launch requirements
tasks.description: Gather and freeze the launch requirements with sign-off from product and legal.

tasks.title: Define service architecture
tasks.description: Define service architecture and public interfaces.

tasks.title: Design the user interface
tasks.description: Design and review the user interface against the frozen requirements.

tasks.title: Implement backend services
tasks.description: Implement backend services against the approved architecture.

tasks.title: Implement frontend
tasks.description: Implement the frontend against the approved design and architecture.

tasks.title: Integrate and wire environments
tasks.description: Integrate frontend and backend, wire staging and production environments.

tasks.title: End-to-end QA pass
tasks.description: Run the end-to-end test pass and fix launch-blocking defects.

tasks.title: Public launch
tasks.description: Cut over to production and announce the public launch.
